name: Imprisonment

components.materialDescription: a statuette of the target worth 5,000+ GP

measuredDetails.label: Minimized Target Size
measuredDetails.notes: Applies to the Minimus Containment option.

effects.description: You create a magical restraint to hold a creature that you can see within range. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the target is unaffected, and it is immune to this spell for the next 24 hours. On a failed save, the target is imprisoned. While imprisoned, the target doesn't need to breathe, eat, or drink, and it doesn't age. Divination spells can't locate or perceive the imprisoned target, and the target can't teleport. Until the spell ends, the target is also affected by one of the following effects of your choice: Burial. The target is entombed beneath the earth in a hollow globe of magical force that is just large enough to contain the target. Nothing can pass into or out of the globe. Chaining. Chains firmly rooted in the ground hold the target in place. The target has the Restrained condition and can't be moved by any means. Hedged Prison. The target is trapped in a demiplane that is warded against teleportation and planar travel. The demiplane is your choice of a labyrinth, a cage, a tower, or the like. Minimus Containment. The target becomes 1 inch tall and is trapped inside an indestructible gemstone or a similar object. Light can pass through the gemstone (allowing the target to see out and other creatures to see in), but nothing else can pass through by any means. Slumber. The target has the Unconscious condition and can't be awoken. Ending the Spell. When you cast the spell, specify a trigger that will end it. The trigger can be as simple or as elaborate as you choose, but the DM must agree that it has a high likelihood of happening within the next decade. The trigger must be an observable action, such as someone making a particular offering at the temple of your god, saving your true love, or defeating a specific monster. A Dispel Magic spell can end the spell only if it is cast with a level 9 spell slot, targeting either the prison or the component used to create it.

controlOptions.name: Save immunity
controlOptions.effect: On a successful Wisdom save, the target is unaffected and immune to this spell for the next 24 hours.

controlOptions.name: Imprisoned upkeep
controlOptions.effect: While imprisoned, the target does not need to breathe, eat, or drink, and does not age.

controlOptions.name: Divination and teleport block
controlOptions.effect: Divination spells cannot locate or perceive the imprisoned target, and the target cannot teleport.

controlOptions.name: Burial
controlOptions.effect: The target is entombed under the earth in a hollow globe of magical force just large enough for it; nothing can pass in or out.

controlOptions.name: Chaining
controlOptions.effect: Chains rooted in the ground hold the target in place; it is Restrained and cannot be moved by any means.

controlOptions.name: Hedged Prison
controlOptions.effect: The target is trapped in a demiplane warded against teleportation and planar travel, with a form chosen by the caster.

controlOptions.name: Minimus Containment
controlOptions.effect: The target becomes 1 inch tall inside an indestructible gemstone or similar object; light passes through but nothing else can pass through by any means.

controlOptions.name: Slumber
controlOptions.effect: The target has the Unconscious condition and cannot be awoken.

controlOptions.name: Ending trigger
controlOptions.effect: The caster specifies an observable ending trigger that the DM agrees has a high likelihood of happening within the next decade.

controlOptions.name: Ninth-level dispel
controlOptions.effect: Dispel Magic ends the spell only if cast with a level 9 spell slot and aimed at either the prison or the component used to create it.

effects.description: On a failed Wisdom save, the target is imprisoned until the spell ends.
The Chaining option gives the imprisoned target the Restrained condition.
The Slumber option gives the imprisoned target the Unconscious condition and prevents waking.
The imprisoned target cannot teleport, and Hedged Prison is warded against teleportation and planar travel.

aiContext.prompt: Ask the caster to choose Burial, Chaining, Hedged Prison, Minimus Containment, or Slumber, and to state the observable ending trigger that the DM must approve.
